name: ng-graphql-playground
description: Type-safe full-stack monorepo for managing long-running manufacturing workflows

scripts.db:migrate: cd backend/src/FactoryApp.WebApi && dotnet ef database update
scripts.setup: npm run docker:up && npm run db:migrate && echo '✅ Setup complete. Run: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend'
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm run ng serve
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend

author: Pluto Atom
